name: Braintrust AI Proxy
description: Braintrust AI Proxy — Caching and logging proxy for LLM API calls with cost tracking and unified provider interface.

seo.title: Braintrust AI Proxy — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Braintrust AI Proxy: Braintrust AI Proxy — Caching and logging proxy for LLM API calls with cost tracking and unified provider interface.

when_to_use: Proxying LLM API calls to log, cache, and rate-limit centrally
A/B testing multiple models behind a single proxy endpoint
Reducing LLM costs via semantic caching of repeated prompts
Capturing all LLM traces for observability and debugging

pros: Unified interface across OpenAI, Anthropic, others
cons: Adds a network hop and potential failure point
Most value requires full Braintrust suite
Cache hits tricky for dynamic prompts
review.verdict: Clear win if you already use Braintrust; weaker as a standalone proxy vs Helicone or Portkey.
review.best_for: Teams standardizing LLM evals and observability on Braintrust
review.not_for: Teams only needing a lightweight proxy without eval tooling
